_comment: Eval set v0 — minimal skeleton. Real 100 queries are a Week 4 deliverable; this file is a structural placeholder + 5 examples exercising the existing AAI 6600 seed. PLAN §4.1 distribution target: 30 simple, 30 medium, 20 complex, 10 boundary, 10 adversarial.

queries.rationale: Direct primary code lookup via v_course_lookup.
